---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve AgriscaleContainer
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**Component affected**
- [ ] Container build system (Makefile, Dockerfile)
- [ ] APSIM compilation
- [ ] DSSAT compilation
- [ ] STICS/JavaStics
- [ ] Datamill utility
- [ ] Celsius utility
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other (specify below)

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Clone repository
2. Run command '...'
3. See error

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Error messages / logs**
```
Paste any error messages or relevant log output here
```

**Environment (please complete the following information):**
 - OS: [e.g., Ubuntu 22.04, WSL2, macOS]
 - Docker version: [e.g., 24.0.5]
 - .NET SDK version: [run `dotnet --version`]
 - Make version: [run `make --version`]

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here.

**Note on model-specific issues:**
If your issue is specifically about APSIM, DSSAT, or STICS model behavior (not build/container issues), please report to the respective model's repository:
- APSIM: https://github.com/APSIMInitiative/ApsimX/issues
- DSSAT: https://github.com/DSSAT/dssat-csm-os/issues
- STICS: Contact INRAE support
